reasoning: Initial observation shows V = 20.0 when I = 2.0 and R = 10.0. To determine the relationship, I will increase I to see if V changes.
Increasing I from 2.0 to 3.0 increased V from 20.0 to 30.0 while R remained constant. This suggests V is directly proportional to I.
V has increased proportionally with I when R was held constant. Given the initial observation and subsequent increases, it's reasonable to conclude that V = I * R.
